name: OpenRouter
access_method: API key via OpenRouter dashboard; OpenAI-compatible base URL; official SDK; Agent SDK
cost_notes: Usage-based by selected model. OpenRouter Auto Router has no extra routing fee beyond the selected model price according to current docs. Free-model routes may exist but must be rate-limit checked before production.

provider_policies.balanced: Default OpenRouter routing with fallback enabled.
provider_policies.fast: Prefer the lowest observed latency while retaining fallback.
provider_policies.economy: Prefer lower-priced providers while retaining fallback.
provider_policies.private: Deny provider data collection where supported and require requested parameters.
provider_policies.reasoning: Require providers to support requested reasoning parameters and allow fallback.
provider_policies.vision: Require providers to support requested multimodal parameters and allow fallback.

abba_policy.rule: OpenRouter may route model calls, but ABBA remains resolver and SEAL remains approval authority.

activation_path: Keep OPENROUTER_API_KEY in Vercel and GitHub secrets only, never repo files.
Set OPENROUTER_SITE_URL and OPENROUTER_APP_TITLE for request attribution.
Set OPENROUTER_ALLOWED_MODELS to a comma-separated allowlist or leave empty during controlled sandbox testing.
Test streaming, structured output validation, each provider policy, fallback behavior and request cancellation.
Set OPENROUTER_PRODUCTION_ENABLED=true only after SEAL-4 review.
Log selected model metadata, latency and error status only; do not log raw private prompts by default.
Keep identity, finance, legal, HAPI memory and irreversible actions behind product-specific authorization beyond the request-level SEAL flag.
